mainText:
Promo: "Bank of Entitlement - where your every whim is our command! Because you deserve it all."

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So there I was, strolling into my Bank of Entitlement branch, expecting the red carpet treatment as always. But to my horror, the teller had the audacity to ask for my ID like I was some regular plebeian! Oh, the nerve! I promptly demanded to see the manager, who apologized profusely and promised me complimentary spa vouchers to make up for the inconvenience. Ah, the perks of being me.
